goal: Make the vince-mp CLI + vince-mp-cli-sup skill genuinely usable for daily WeChat Mini Program dev: kill per-call reconnect lag (persistent session daemon, stable uids), collapse the multi-step attach ceremony into one command, and add camera-less scan / real doctor / requestId correlation / env+uid lookup; verified by live DevTools loops.

stages.gate_evidence: Scope + design authored from project-memory pain points + CLI source read: daemon-session architecture + one-command connect + 4 secondary features; P0/P1/P2 actions + 22-edge adversarial checklist. Deliverable is CLI-heavy (npm package, Volta-symlinked = live) + skill rewrite, so Stage E is driven with red-green TDD on the CLI's node --test harness + live DevTools smokes; guidance/zipper apply to the skill.

CLI rebuilt red-green (red logs in vince-mp-cli/.tdd-red/): project-resolve (fixes INVALID_PROJECT on miniprogramRoot), automation-port (one-command connect), session daemon + thin client (connection reuse, stable uids, idle-reap, stale-socket), step shorthands + run-via-session + camera-less scan, snapshot batching, pageData default bump, real doctor (tsc/.js-freshness/domain/LAN), backend env/logs, APP_NOT_RUNNING fast-fail. node --test 50/50 green. Skill rewritten session-first (SKILL.md 94 lines, 5 load-on-demand docs, references official skyline-* skills); validate-skill.mjs green. Live-verified vs real DevTools: one-command connect, 3-72ms/cmd reuse, uid persistence across invocations, scan, console, doctor, 20-way concurrency.

Skipped (allowed optional stage): skill freshly authored tight — SKILL.md 94 lines (cap 220), docs 61-122 lines load-on-demand; only SKILL.md is always-loaded. No bloat; a lossless-compression pass would risk rewording a clean skill for negligible token gain. Not lossy — content left intact.

Independent battery against the LIVE CLI+DevTools: 39/42 cases clean, but 1 green-but-wrong (console showed one console.log as 5-8 duplicate entries — automation re-delivery) + 2 cosmetic (session errors dropped the suggestions field; one-shot run omitted the via tag). battery_verdict=candidate.

Fixed: console coalescing of identical back-to-back deliveries (workflow.js, + unit test; distinct/time-separated logs preserved); suggestions propagated through daemon stepError + runWorkflow + routeStep + shorthands; via:one-shot on one-shot run. 51/51 green; all three fixes live-verified (1 log = 1 entry; suggestions present; via present).

Round-1 fixes all confirmed (Part A 6/6). New finding BUG-1: the docs declare --port/--no-session universal common flags, but strict parseArgs rejected them on doctor/env/logs/capabilities/smoke-existing/screenshot/media (UNEXPECTED_ERROR). battery_verdict=candidate.

Added port + no-session to COMMON_OPTIONS so the documented common flags are universally tolerated (no-ops where unused); strict parsing still rejects truly-unknown flags. 52/52 green + black-box test; verified doctor/env/logs/capabilities/smoke-existing all accept --port.

Independent certification: industrial, ZERO bugs across 6 contract areas + adversarial probes (common flags universal yet unknown flags still rejected; console coalescing does not hide handler invocations; uid persistence across calls; PATH_OUTSIDE_WORKSPACE/storageClear-confirm/UNSAFE_WX safety intact; via tags correct). Structural re-audit: design + low_context_kb + testing + tdd present; metrics now present (metric-plan carries measured data). validate-skill.mjs green.
